data.name: Home.Hero.Title
data.value: The management platform built for animal shelter teams and the animals in their care.

data.name: Home.Hero.Copy
data.value: Beagl gives shelter staff and administrators a unified workspace to manage day-to-day operations. Oversee employee accounts, track animal care, and maintain visibility across your shelter — all from one place.

data.name: Home.Highlight.Workspace.Copy
data.value: Manage staff accounts, animal records, and shelter workflows without switching contexts.

data.name: Home.Highlight.Clarity.Copy
data.value: Status indicators and contextual panels keep shelter operations readable and actionable.

data.name: Home.Highlight.Teams.Copy
data.value: Responsive and accessible on desktop and mobile, for staff on the floor or at the desk.
